notes: Encoder only — converts HDMI input to NDI network output; it has no decoding capability (the corresponding decoder is the Pro Convert HDMI RX). The 'type' field is omitted because no encoder-only enum value exists; 'Encoder/Decoder' would be materially wrong. Device is powered via PoE (IEEE 802.3af on Ethernet) or 5V/2.1A via USB Type B — there is no separate DC barrel jack or IEC power inlet. The PTZ/Tally port is a Mini-DIN 8-pin connector; midi-din is used as the closest physical type (signaling is RS232/VISCA). No dedicated analog audio ports; audio is embedded in HDMI.

ports.name: HDMI
ports.note: Also accepts DVI-D via adapter; up to 2048x1200 60fps 4:4:4/4:2:2

ports.name: Ethernet
ports.note: 10/100/1000Mbps; supports IEEE 802.3af PoE for device power

ports.name: USB
ports.note: USB 2.0 Type B; used for device configuration (RNDIS/ECM) and 5V/2.1A power input

ports.name: PTZ/Tally
ports.note: Mini-DIN 8-pin jack; shared PTZ camera control (RS232/VISCA/Pelco) and tally light output. Closest connector in schema is midi-din (physical Mini-DIN 8).
